subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be My Glory! That which thou didst write concerning Elijah hath been heard, yet at times he is like [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهائی آنچه درباره الیاهو نوشتی اصغا شد ولکن ایشان گاهی بمثابه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @free will and predestination; fate
